feat.name: Lotus Above the Mud
feat.text: Your qi, dancing ever diligently toward cultivation, eludes the grasp of the world’s muck and mire. When you cast your *adapt self* or *athletic rush* focus spells, you ignore difficult terrain until the end of your next turn.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.
